'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 29''' was the twenty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 17]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Capture of Theed/Legends|The Capture of Theed]]
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]
*[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] - [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]
*[[CZ-series secretary/comm droid|Business Droids]]
*[[S-5 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|Security S-5 Heavy Blaster]]
*[[XJ-6 airspeeder/Legends|Anakin's Airspeeder]]
